title: Cheap TNT
body:
This datapack simply changes the crafting of tnt to be 1 gun powder and 4 sand.
1 gun powder in the middle with sand on every side but the corners.
This datapack is realy light and works on every server.
![The crafting for TNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d6e8904890b649ade5c43bbeb7fe8b92f4bcaf5.png)
